cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)

project("tree-sitter-make")

# Set the root project directory
set(PROJECT_DIR "/root/tina-android-tree-sitter")

# Include common configuration
include("/root/tina-android-tree-sitter/cmake/common-config.cmake")

# This includes the header file for the parser
include_directories("/root/tina-android-tree-sitter/grammars/make/src")

# add tree-sitter-java library
add_library(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} SHARED
        "/root/tina-android-tree-sitter/grammars/make/src/parser.c"
        
        tree-sitter-make.cpp)
        
if (${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME} STREQUAL Android)
    # Find the log library and link it to tree-sitter-make
    find_library(log log)
    target_link_libraries(tree-sitter-make ${log})
endif()
